name: Lilith&Others | Dungeon
description:
It's all very simple. Lilith is a newborn Dungeon Master, but... She is timid and shy and her magic is still too weak to subjugate the monsters in her own dungeon. In addition, the necromancer Malveria wants to take advantage of the moment and seize the dungeon for herself. You are a familiar, whom Lilith somehow managed to summon to her aid. Will you help the poor demoness?

In addition, monsters and treasures appear in the monster dungeon, regardless of Lilith's wishes, which attracts outside adventurers...

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Phew, this is a pretty plump bot in terms of characters, as many as five rather interesting personalities at a time! The scenario is, of course, one, but the bot comes up with different encounters each time. At the last moment, I had to change Mihven a little before releasing the bot, because the previous Mihven was a bit... simple, it was not interesting to play with her. So here is Princess Mihven.

Dead Dove tag for the bot's personality. Although I made the bot as neutral as possible, and you can safely avoid unwanted content, but the rules require this tag to be put even when mentioning non-con. It's hard to keep track of everything with one hand, Te-he~

All the girls' names:

Lilith

Malveria

Nyla

Kiara

Mihven

The news says that it will soon be possible to return pictures to the bot description, which is good. I'll just paste the bot pictures here now, maybe it will work for you (Bot creators see the pictures as usual, but Users do not see them).

And also... I made quite a few good nsfw angles with Malveria at the request of one of the followers :3 You can find them on my small channel in discord. And not only my nsfw: on the Demihuman Discord channel. All the extras and more (nsfw) are there.

And also... Why do you need this solo bot Alaria? You can play solo Alaria in a group bot >_>

P.S. I don't have enough tags for all five...

Updated: Added names.
creator: PavPav
